fieldValues.value: What specific obligations do we commit to if and when the project closes?

The founding meeting discussed the importance of being honest with artists about what happens if the project ends. Article A-006 states the constitutional commitment; this decision makes it operational and specific.

On closure the group commits to: (1) returning all artworks to their makers within 14 days of the closure decision; (2) making good all fixings and mounts within 28 days; (3) settling any outstanding commitments to artists before disbanding; (4) transferring any remaining group funds to the Party Utility. The Clerk records when each obligation is discharged.
Specific timelines make the commitment real. Without them, 'we will return work' is a statement of intent that can drift indefinitely.
